conflict: Re-entering police territory risks exposure, but staying ignorant will leave Ferrand free to manufacture the case Vautrin wants.
consequence: Elise discovers Ferrand is a paid provocateur and chooses to warn Lucien selectively, crossing from compromised operative to active traitor.
must_land_beats: Elise navigates police bureaucracy and old access habits in order to retrieve what she needs.
She finds proof that Ferrand is being paid to create a bomb case, not merely monitor one.
She warns Lucien enough to alter his plans without yet confessing her own role.
objective: Learn what Vautrin plans now that ordinary reporting has broken down.
